# The Secret to Excellent Bud Quality
by Nebula Haze
Your [growing medium](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-is-a-marijuana-grow-medium) and [nutrients](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nutrients) are important, but the _secret_ to amazing bud quality is actually a combination of two other things… You must choose [the right strain](https://www.growweedeasy.com/find-strain) and give plants a great [environment](https://www.growweedeasy.com/perfect-growing-environment) in the flowering stage while buds are forming.
The **genetics** and **flowering environment** have a profound effect on bud quality
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/auto-flowering-plants-tent-with-short-purple-plant.jpg)
Even if plants seem to be doing okay, don’t ignore [temperature](https://www.growweedeasy.com/temperature) or [humidity](https://www.growweedeasy.com/humidity) problems when plants are making buds. With healthy cannabis plants, the flowering environment determines whether genetics live up to their full potential.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/trichome-covered-bud-in-flowering-stage.jpg)
And remember that regardless of anything else you do, you can’t grow outstanding buds without great [genetics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/nug-closeup-trichomes.jpg)
Check out [American genetics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-american-cannabis-seed-bank-in-usa) for extra sparkly strain options.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/sparkly-trichome-nugs.jpg)
Grow the bud you’ve always wanted
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/trichome-nug-on-black-background.jpg)
**How to Improve…**
  * [Yields](https://www.growweedeasy.com/increase-yields-indoors)
  * [Bud Quality](https://www.growweedeasy.com/7-tips-to-growing-top-shelf-buds)
  * [THC Levels](https://www.growweedeasy.com/increase-thc-potency-growing-weed)
  * [CBD Levels](https://www.growweedeasy.com/increase-cbd-growing-weed)
  * [Smell/Taste](https://www.growweedeasy.com/better-taste-better-smell)
  * [Density](https://www.growweedeasy.com/dense-buds)
  * [Bud Color](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-purple-buds) (How to Grow Pink or Purple Buds)
  * [Glitter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/make-buds-sparkle-with-more-trichomes) (Make Buds Sparkle with More Trichomes)

Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home.
